brand.name: menu
brand.cityLine: Made for home kitchens. Built in Mumbai.

hero.subtitle: Stop losing 28% to Food Delivery apps. Get a beautiful digital menu, WhatsApp ordering, and your own customer list - all in one place.

primaryCta.label: See What your Menu could look like

hero.note: 45-day free trial - No credit card - Cancel anytime

problem.heading: Running a home kitchen is hard enough. Taking orders should not be.
problem.description: You are replying to the same Instagram DMs 50 times a day. Your price list is a screenshot. And Food Delivery apps take a cut of every single order.

cards.title: DM chaos
cards.description: "What is available?" "Do you deliver to Andheri?" "How much for a box of 12?" - repeated all day.

cards.title: Screenshot menus
cards.description: A blurry photo of a handwritten list is not a menu. Your food deserves better.

cards.title: 28% gone to platforms
cards.description: Food Delivery apps can take around Rs.280 from every Rs.1,000 order.

cards.title: No customer data
cards.description: You cannot see who your regulars are or easily reach them for repeat orders.

howItWorks.title: Build your menu in minutes
howItWorks.description: Add dishes, upload photos, set prices, and toggle availability daily. No technical setup required.

howItWorks.title: Drop the link in your Instagram bio
howItWorks.description: You get a clean menu page at menufast.in/yourkitchen. One link for browsing and ordering.

howItWorks.title: Orders land directly on WhatsApp
howItWorks.description: Customers send a structured order message with items, quantities, and notes straight to your WhatsApp.

howItWorks.title: Build your own customer list
howItWorks.description: Every order helps you build your own audience for reorders, offers, and feedback.

liveDemo.businessMeta: Home bakery - Mumbai - Orders via WhatsApp

pricing.footnote: Custom branding, logo upload, and more templates coming in the Pro plan.

faq.question: Do I need a website or any tech skills?
faq.answer: No. If you can fill a simple form, you can set up your menu. Hosting and link setup are handled for you.

faq.question: How does WhatsApp ordering work?
faq.answer: Customers tap the WhatsApp CTA and send a prefilled order message to your number with item details.

faq.question: Can I update my menu daily?
faq.answer: Yes, you can quickly mark items available or sold out every day.

faq.question: What is different from Food Delivery apps?
faq.answer: You keep your order value, own your customer list, and control how your menu is shared.

faq.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faq.answer: Yes, there is no long-term lock-in.

finalCta.heading: Ready to own your orders?
finalCta.description: Set up your menu in 10 minutes. Share the link. Start receiving orders.
finalCta.note: Rs.399/month after 14 days. No card needed to start.
